title_cn: 首达时间中的隐藏路径
subtitle_en: A recent research line on how random-walk hitting-time distributions encode fast and slow pathways.
subtitle_cn: 最近几个月推进的一条研究线：随机游走首达时间分布如何编码快慢路径。
audience_cn: 面向不同方向的 SMET PhD 听众
theme_en: Mechanism first, evidence second, outlook and mathematics last.
theme_cn: 先讲机制，再给证据，最后落到开放问题与数学骨架。

slides.title: Hidden Routes in First-Passage Time
slides.sentence: A one-target ring can still split into a fast branch, a valley, and a delayed branch once a directed shortcut is present.
slides.question_en: What scientific question links the recent ring and 2D work?
slides.question_cn: 最近的 ring 和 2D 工作，到底被哪个科学问题串起来？

evidence.alt_en: Realistic 1D ring hero slide with shortcut and bimodal first-passage curve
evidence.alt_cn: 带有 shortcut 与双峰首达曲线的 1D ring 开场图

slides.title: What Is First-Passage Time?
slides.sentence: It is the first time a walker reaches a target.
slides.question_en: What quantity are we actually measuring?

slides.title: Why a Double Peak Matters
slides.sentence: A single peak means one dominant timescale; a double peak means two route families remain visible.
slides.question_en: Why look at the whole distribution instead of one average time?
slides.question_cn: 为什么要看整条分布，而不是只看一个平均时间？

evidence.alt_en: Single peak versus double peak schematic explanation
evidence.alt_cn: 单峰与双峰的示意解释图

slides.title: Single Target on a Ring
slides.sentence: The same shortcut ring can stay broad or split into two visible timescales.
slides.question_en: How does a minimal single-target shortcut model produce one peak in one regime and two peaks in another?
slides.question_cn: 最小单目标 shortcut ring 是怎样在一个 regime 下保持单峰、在另一个 regime 下分裂成双峰的？

evidence.alt_en: Realistic ring shortcut geometry paired with a real one-peak versus two-peak ring figure
evidence.alt_cn: 真实 ring shortcut 几何与真实单峰/双峰 ring 图的组合页

slides.title: Route Design Changes the Distribution
slides.sentence: Retuning the shortcut destination changes both late-branch strength and late-branch timing.
slides.question_en: What did the recent single-target scans add beyond the minimal example?
slides.question_cn: 最近这几个月的单目标扫描，新增了什么信息？

evidence.alt_en: Real destination scans for late-branch weight and peak timings
evidence.alt_cn: 真实终点扫描图：晚分支权重与峰位时间

slides.title: Which 2D Configurations Keep a Double Peak Visible?
slides.sentence: In two dimensions, geometry decides whether one route family dominates or whether two visible timescales survive.
slides.question_en: What kinds of 2D spatial configuration can actually keep a double peak visible?
slides.question_cn: 什么样的二维空间 configuration 才能真正让双峰保持可见？

evidence.alt_en: One-target partition schematic paired with a two-target companion geometry
evidence.alt_cn: 单目标 partition 示意图与双目标 companion geometry 的组合页

slides.title: Outside Excursion or Membrane Crossing?
slides.sentence: Peak2 separates from the valley more strongly through outside-time budget than through membrane probability alone.
slides.question_en: Is the late mechanism mainly outside motion, or mainly the membrane event itself?
slides.question_cn: 晚峰机制主要是 outside motion，还是主要是 membrane crossing 本身？

evidence.alt_en: Symmetric corridor geometry with outside-budget and membrane-budget evidence
evidence.alt_cn: 对称 corridor 几何，以及 outside-budget 与 membrane-budget 的证据页

slides.title: From One Target to Many Potential Targets
slides.sentence: The next step is to separate route competition from target competition, and then understand how they combine.
slides.question_en: Where does this research line go next once there is more than one possible target?
slides.question_cn: 一旦系统里不止一个目标，这条研究线最自然会走向哪里？

evidence.alt_en: Two-target mechanism page and many-target outlook page
evidence.alt_cn: 双目标机制页与多目标展望页

slides.title: Minimal Mathematical Backbone
slides.sentence: The basic 2D random-walk evolution, the first-hit time T, and the first-passage distribution f(t) are the mathematical core behind all of these figures.
slides.question_en: What are the smallest equations you can keep in mind while listening to the story?
slides.question_cn: 如果只记最小的一组公式，应该记什么？
